highlights.title: PDF import and reading
highlights.description: Add local PDFs to the library with outlines, selection, annotations, and focused co-reading.

highlights.title: WeRead integration
highlights.description: Sync notes and reading stats from WeRead into the local Yomitomo reading library.

highlights.title: Keyboard paging and reading fonts
highlights.description: Added keyboard paging, bundled reading fonts, and automatic settings save feedback.

highlights.title: PDF and reader fixes
highlights.description: Fixed PDF selection, outline behavior, annotation flow, and several reader interaction issues.
